developmentName: Farnsworth Court / Greenwich Millennium Village Phases 1 and 2

features.liftSizeOrCargoElevator: Unknown; no cargo/service elevator evidence found. Fire statement says evacuation lifts were not considered viable as part of remedial works.

incidents.description: Inside Housing reported Holly Court lift problems: a resident said she had to carry her seven-year-old daughter with cerebral palsy to a fourth-floor flat because of problems with the lift. This is GMV/Holly Court evidence, not Farnsworth-specific.

Not a roof leak: included as nearest available schema category for a GMV catastrophic flooding/water-system defect litigated in 2013. The source describes cold-water-system failures causing ?4.75m damage. Treat as water-services/flooding evidence, not roof evidence.

Fire-safety/remediation trigger rather than an actual fire incident: after Government EWS guidance, GMVML commissioned intrusive surveys and all 10 high-rise buildings were deemed to require EWS remediation, including replacement of cladding and installation of suitable fire breaks where missing or inadequate.

Not a dated outage: Switch2 reported the existing heat network serving phases 1 and 2 was outdated and difficult to maintain, and announced a 30-year retrofit/operation/maintenance partnership intended to upgrade equipment while maintaining heat and hot water supply.
